name: Create a variant from a Template part via the Variants tab
steps:
Given a part 'Widget Base' is marked as a Template part
Given a user with part create permission is logged in and on the part detail page for 'Widget Base'
When the user clicks the 'Variants' tab
When the user clicks the 'New Variant' button
When the user fills in the Duplicate Part form entering 'Widget-Red' in the 'Part Name' field
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the Variants tab for 'Widget Base' shows 'Widget-Red' as a new variant

name: Serial numbers must be unique across a template and all its variants
steps:
Given a Template part 'Widget' with two trackable variants 'Widget-01' and 'Widget-02'
Given a stock item for 'Widget-01' already has serial number 'SN-0042' assigned
Given a user with stock create permission is logged in
When the user creates a new stock item for 'Widget-02' and enters 'SN-0042' in the serial number field
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the system rejects the submission with an error indicating serial number 'SN-0042' is already in use across the template group

name: Stock reporting for a Template part includes stock from all variants
steps:
Given a Template part 'Widget' with variants 'Widget-Red' (30 units in stock) and 'Widget-Blue' (20 units in stock)
Given a user is logged in and on the part detail page for 'Widget'
When the user views the Stock tab for 'Widget'
Then the total stock count shown for 'Widget' includes all 50 units from both 'Widget-Red' and 'Widget-Blue'
